<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/es_UY.php', [ 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'HH:mm', 'LTS' => 'HH:mm:ss', 'L' => 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd, D MMMM, YYYY HH:mm', ], 'first_day_of_week' => 0, ]);
